evals.prompt: Set up a collaborative workflow where three explore agents research different aspects of the codebase and share their findings with cross-references
evals.expected_output: Communication protocol with source sharing and cross-reference structure
expectations: Defines source sharing protocol with XML structure
Sets up source registry for verified findings
Includes cross-reference format for citing sources
Specifies how to handle conflicting information
Creates aggregation mechanism for combining findings

evals.prompt: The explore agent found information that conflicts with what the execute agent discovered. Help resolve this conflict and ensure both agents have the correct information.
evals.expected_output: Conflict resolution protocol and communication to sync agents
expectations: Documents both claims with source references
Updates source registry with verified information
